betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Utility Items§f

§aEssential tools and items for building, upgrading, and managing your base!§f

Core utility items used across all Thermal mods.

§6Crescent Hammer§f — Iron Ingot + Tin Ingot. §9Shift-right-click§f to pick up machines. §9Right-click§f to rotate blocks. Also a weapon.

§6Multimeter§f — §9Right-click§f any machine to read RF storage, I/O rates, and redstone status.

§6Redprint§f — §9Right-click§f a configured machine to copy settings, §9right-click§f another to paste.

§6Upgrade Kits§f — Upgrade machines: Basic → Hardened → Reinforced → Signalum → Resonant. Retains upgrades and inventory.

§6Conversion Kits§f — Convert machines between input/output variants.

§6Forge Lexicon§f — Converts items between equivalent forms from different mods.

§6Tome of Knowledge§f — Stores up to §e10,000 XP§f. Prevents XP loss on death.

§6Signalum Security Lock§f — Locks machines to a specific player.

§6Farming & Fishing§f:
§b• Phyto-Gro§f — Fertilizer (Rich and Fluxed variants).
§b• Aqua-Chow§f — Fishing bait (Rich and Fluxed variants).
§b• Pigments§f — §e16§f dyes from ore processing byproducts.
